description: Style Note Block the elements and look sporty in this fabulous cap from lee. The soft fabric keeps your head cool and dry all day. Team it with jeans, tees and sneakers to complete your sporty fashion statement. Product Details Stitch detailing around the crown of the head Curved visor Branding appliquéd on a leather badge in a cut out design Stitch detailing on the visor Material and Care 100% cotton Dry clean only
